benefits.description: Lost 20 pounds since mid June, 10 pounds from goal

side_effects.description: Unable to eat anything at initial dose of 1ml; required several weeks of adjustment

protocol_notes: Doses reported in mL (not mg) which is not a proper measurement without knowing reconstitution. Started at 1ml (too much), adjusted to 0.4ml per week as sweet spot. Husband also using Reta at 6ml/week and has lost 36 pounds. Note: mL doses cannot be converted to mg without reconstitution details.
